seo.title: Word to PDF Converter — Free & Fast Online | SmallPDF.us
seo.description: Convert Word to PDF in seconds — free, no signup needed. Upload your DOC or DOCX file and get a perfectly formatted PDF that looks great on any device. 100MB limit. Works on all browsers.

heroTitle: Convert Word to PDF — Free & Instant
heroSubtitle: Drop your DOC or DOCX file and get a clean, professional PDF in under 3 seconds. No account. No watermark. No nonsense.
uploadSubtitle: Drag & drop your file here, or click to browse
uploadFormats: Supports DOC and DOCX · Max 100 MB

featuresSubtitle: We built a converter that actually works — every time. No formatting surprises, no blurry fonts, no missing images.
feature1Desc: Headings, tables, bullet points, columns — everything stays exactly where you put it. Your Word layout is preserved pixel-perfect in the final PDF.
feature2Desc: Convert from your phone, tablet, or laptop. No app to install. Just open a browser and you're good to go.
feature3Desc: Files are processed securely and automatically deleted from our servers after conversion. We never read or store your content.
feature4Desc: Embedded images, custom fonts, and graphics are all preserved. No broken visuals, no missing text.
feature5Desc: Most files convert in under 3 seconds. Upload once, download immediately — no waiting around.
feature6Desc: Just upload and convert. No account, no email, no subscription. It's completely free for everyone.
stepsSubtitle: From upload to download in under a minute. Here's exactly what happens.
step1Desc: Click the upload area or drag your DOC/DOCX file straight onto it. Both legacy .doc and modern .docx formats are fully supported.
step2Desc: Our engine processes your file and converts it to PDF while keeping every heading, image, table, and font exactly as designed.
step3Desc: Your PDF is ready in seconds. Click download and you're done — it'll open perfectly on any device, app, or printer.
faqSubtitle: Got a question? We probably have the answer right here.
faq1Q: Is this Word to PDF converter really free?
faq1A: Yes — 100% free, no strings attached. You don't need to sign up, pay, or install anything. Just upload your file and download the PDF.
faq2Q: Will my formatting survive the conversion?
faq2A: Absolutely. Our converter is built specifically to preserve Word formatting. Tables, bullet points, custom fonts, images, headers, footers, and page breaks all come through cleanly.
faq3Q: Is it safe to upload my documents here?
faq3A: Yes. All file transfers are encrypted (HTTPS). Your files are processed in memory and automatically deleted from our servers after conversion — we never store or read your content.
faq4A: We support both .DOC (older Word format) and .DOCX (modern Word format). Files up to 100 MB are accepted.
faq5Q: Can I convert a Word file with images and tables?
faq5A: Definitely. Images, tables, charts, and all embedded objects are fully supported. Everything that's in your Word document will appear in the PDF.
